channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Trump vows to hit more Iranian infrastructure as nations seek to open Hormuz - reuters.com

item.title: Hiker's dog lost in a wild New Zealand forest is rescued by helicopter after strangers fund search - NBC News
item.description:
1. Hiker's dog lost in a wild New Zealand forest is rescued by helicopter after strangers fund search  NBC News
  2. Volunteers in Helicopter Rescue Hiker’s Dog After a Week in the Wilderness  The New York Times
  3. Molly the border collie rescued after a week waiting for injured owner in New Zealand’s remote backcountry  The Guardian
  4. WATCH: Lost dog reunited with owner one week after she fell down a waterfall  WMUR
  5. Molly the border collie found a week after owner’s hiking accident in New Zealand  The Independent

item.title: Premature Babies Evacuated After Israeli Attack on Al-Shifa Returned to Gaza After More Than Two Years - Drop Site News
item.description:
1. Premature Babies Evacuated After Israeli Attack on Al-Shifa Returned to Gaza After More Than Two Years  Drop Site News
  2. Evacuated From War-Torn Gaza, 11 Toddlers Return Home to Hugs and Tears  The New York Times
  3. Babies evacuated from Gaza two years ago returned to their overjoyed parents  reuters.com
  4. Gaza families reunite years after babies evacuated amid Israel’s war  Al Jazeera
  5. Gazan mother reunited with evacuated daughter after two years  BBC

item.title: America Lost. Iran Won. Trump Shat the Bed. - The Bulwark
item.description: America Lost. Iran Won. Trump Shat the Bed.  The BulwarkView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: Putin warns Armenia it can’t be both a member of EU and Russia-led economic bloc - AP News
item.description:
1. Putin warns Armenia it can’t be both a member of EU and Russia-led economic bloc  AP News
  2. Armenia Cannot Be in Both EU and Moscow-Led Customs Bloc, Putin says  The Moscow Times
  3. Russian-Armenian talks  Президент России
  4. Putin Confronts Pashinyan Over Election Rules and Armenia’s Westward Drift  Kyiv Post
  5. Armenia Sets Sights on EU—Not Russia, as Pashinyan and Putin Meet in Moscow  UNITED24 Media

item.title: Iran launches biggest salvo of missiles in three weeks at Israel, military officials say - Euronews
item.description:
1. Iran launches biggest salvo of missiles in three weeks at Israel, military officials say  Euronews
  2. Iran Continues Strikes on Gulf States, Israel After Trump’s Address  WSJ
  3. Iranian missiles strike 9 sites across greater Tel Aviv, damaging train station and building: Reports  Anadolu Ajansı
  4. ADAMA chemicals plant in southern Israel hit by Iranian missile or debris  reuters.com
  5. Iranian cluster munitions cause heavy damage to vehicles, buildings across central Israel  The Jerusalem Post

item.title: Over 100 International Law Experts Warn: U.S. Strikes on Iran Violate UN Charter and May Be War Crimes - Just Security
item.description:
1. Over 100 International Law Experts Warn: U.S. Strikes on Iran Violate UN Charter and May Be War Crimes  Just Security
  2. Opinion | Why the International Criminal Court Isn’t Taking On Iran  WSJ
  3. The U.S.-Iran War Is Illegal. Here’s Why That Matters.  In These Times
  4. A war without accountability: why the Middle East crisis is also a legal quagmire  The Conversation
  5. INTERVIEW - Ban US from using Germany’s bases for Iran war: Opposition to Merz government  Anadolu Ajansı

item.title: Iran Update Special Report, April 1, 2026 - Institute for the Study of War
item.description:
1. Iran Update Special Report, April 1, 2026  Institute for the Study of War

  4. Iranian Retaliatory Strikes in the Middle East 3/31/26  Institute for the Study of War

item.source: Institute for the Study of War
